units.content: Mohr, Newell, and Taylor published CODATA Recommended Values of the Fundamental Physical Constants: 2022 in Reviews of Modern Physics 97, 025002 (2025)
CODATA publication is identified as prior-art metrology methodology relevant to convergence computation
Claim 1's convergence analyser is distinguished from CODATA by real-time classification into four values
Claim 1's convergence analyser is further distinguished by a per-measurer correlation analyser that CODATA does not perform
The distinguishing features are grounded in Specification §2.1
